'''Garqi''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Garqi system/Legends|Garqi system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by three [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and two [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belts]].<ref name="GatORW" />
